# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create a multi-job GitHub Actions workflow where one job builds artifacts and subsequent jobs download and deploy them. The deployment job should download artifacts from the build job and execute deployment scripts. This is for our multi-stage deployment pipeline.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Multi-Stage Deployment

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      artifact_name: ${{ steps.set_artifact_name.outputs.name }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '18'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm install

      - name: Build project
        run: npm run build

      - name: Create dummy artifact directory
        run: |
          mkdir -p dist/my-app
          echo "This is a dummy build artifact for my-app." > dist/my-app/index.html
          echo "version=1.0.0" > dist/my-app/version.txt

      - name: Set artifact name
        id: set_artifact_name
        run: echo "name=my-app-build-${{ github.run_id }}-${{ github.run_attempt }}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ steps.set_artifact_name.outputs.name }}
          path: dist/my-app/

  deploy-staging:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    environment:
      name: Staging
      url: https://staging.example.com
    steps:
      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ needs.build.outputs.artifact_name }}
          path: ./downloaded-artifacts

      - name: List downloaded artifacts
        run: ls -R ./downloaded-artifacts

      - name: Simulate deployment to Staging
        run: |
          echo "Deploying artifacts to Staging environment..."
          echo "Artifacts downloaded to: ./downloaded-artifacts"
          cat ./downloaded-artifacts/index.html
          cat ./downloaded-artifacts/version.txt
          echo "Running deployment script for Staging..."
          # Replace with your actual deployment commands for Staging
          # e.g., scp -r ./downloaded-artifacts/* user@staging.example.com:/var/www/html
          # e.g., ssh user@staging.example.com "systemctl restart nginx"
          echo "Deployment to Staging completed successfully!"

  deploy-production:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: deploy-staging
    environment:
      name: Production
      url: https://production.example.com
    steps:
      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ needs.build.outputs.artifact_name }}
          path: ./downloaded-artifacts

      - name: List downloaded artifacts
        run: ls -R ./downloaded-artifacts

      - name: Simulate deployment to Production
        run: |
          echo "Deploying artifacts to Production environment..."
          echo "Artifacts downloaded to: ./downloaded-artifacts"
          cat ./downloaded-artifacts/index.html
          cat ./downloaded-artifacts/version.txt
          echo "Running deployment script for Production..."
          # Replace with your actual deployment commands for Production
          # e.g., scp -r ./downloaded-artifacts/* user@production.example.com:/var/www/html
          # e.g., ssh user@production.example.com "systemctl restart nginx"
          echo "Deployment to Production completed successfully!"
